title: 1-s2.0-S1359431116310572-main
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Here's the technical information extracted and formatted as requested.

1.  Mathematical equations
    *   (1/c^2) * (∂^2 p' / ∂t^2 ) - ∇^2 p' = γ*(∂q/∂t)
    *   p'(x, t) = Re[p(x) * e^(-iω*t)] = e^(iat) * Re[p(x) * e^(-ikzh)]
    *   k^2 p + ∇^2 p = -iωq(γ - 1) / c^2
    *   FTF(ω) = (q̂/q) / (ûref/uref) = n(ω) * e^(-iωτ(ω))
    *   FDF(û/u, ω) = (q̂/q) / (ûref/uref)  = n(û/u, ω) * e^(-iωτ(û/u,ω))
    *   p̂1(z) = p^+ * exp(ik(z + Lc)) + p^− * exp(−ik(z + Lc))
    *   pĉû1(z) = p^+ * exp(ik(z + Lc)) - p^− * exp(−ik(z + Lc))
    *   p̂2(z) = p^+ * exp(ikz) + p^− * exp(−ikz)
    *   pĉû2(z) = p^+ * exp(ikz) - p^− * exp(−ikz)

2.  Graphs/charts:
    *   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3.  Tables:
    *   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

4.  Diagrams:
    *   Figure 1: Schematic of the perforated plate with a back cavity.
        *   Components and labels:
            *   Back cavity
            *   Perforated plate
            *   P1^+
            *   P1^-
            *   P2^+
            *   P2^-
            *   Uhole
            *   h
            *   a
            *   d
            *   Lc
            *   0
            *   z

5.  Key numbers, constants, parameters:
    *   c: speed of sound
    *   γ: specific heat ratio
    *   t: time
    *   q: heat release
    *   ω: angular frequency
    *   k: wave number
    *   τ: time delay
    *   n: gain index
    *   L: length
    *   z : coordinate.
    *   u_ref: reference point of velocity
    *   Lc: length of the back cavity
    *   h, d, a: dimensions related to the perforated plate

title: 1-s2.0-S1359431116310572-main
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   Q = û₁d² = û₂d²
*   KR = -iωρ₀Q / (p₂(0)-p₁(0))
*   ζp = i [kd²/KR] * [1/tan(He)]
*   Rp = (ζp+1) / (ζp-1)
*   KR = 2a(γ - iδ)
*   γ - iδ = { (π/2)I₁(St) exp(-St) - iK₁(St) sinh(St) } / { St[(π/2)I₁(St) exp(-St) + iK₁(St) cosh(St)] }
*   KR = 2a [ (γ - iδ) + πα/2h ]^-1
*   γ - iδ = St²/3 - i [πSt/4] when St << 1
*   γ - iδ = 1/St - i when St >> 1.
*   KR = 2aSt / (St + 2i/πa²) : for infinitely thin plates.
*   KR = K₀St / (St + i/σ²) : for finite thick plates.
*   ζp = U₁/(c₀²p²) + i [kd²leff / A ]* [1 / tan(He)]
*   Re[ζ] = - U₁/(c₀²p²) = -1
*   Im[ζ] = i [kd²leff / A ] * [1/tan(He)] = 0
*   P = sqrt[U₁/(c₀²)]
*   Lc = 1/k * tan⁻¹(P / kleff)

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   σ = 0.75 (contraction ratio)
*   K₀ = πα²/leff
*   leff = πα/2 + h
*   d = distance between holes
*   He = k Lc (Helmholtz number)
*   St = ωa/Uhole (Strouhal number)
*   ω = angular frequency
*   a = hole radius
*   Uhole = velocity at the hole
*   St₁ = wleff/Uhole  is the Strouhal number
*   I₁, K₁ = modified Bessel functions
*   P = porosity
*   U₁ = bulk velocity in the back cavity
---
